titleStmt.title: SII 10.179: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 179. (A.R. No. 48 of 1909.) ON A PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGĒŚVARA, SIRIPURAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 1094.

summary.p: States that three brothers Sūrapa, Nārāyaṇa and Nāgadēva, sons of Kaṭya-Peggaḍa granted 55 sheep for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Rāmēśvara of Siripuram. Sūrapa is said to have vanquished the enemies of his master Rājēndra-Chōḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti syutyayaśā strilōkanayanō mū
¨rtti striṇētrasya ya strisvādhāyatanu stri
lōkamahita strailōkyadīpa ssatāṁ bha¨rttā
tasya vika¨rttanassya taraṇē strailōkyarakṣāma
ṇēḥ . śiṣyādhītayeju¨rggaṇō divitatō yō yā
jñyavalkyō muniḥ . Ācā·ryyatva mupētya ni
tyavijayi vādēcatu¨rvvēdagaḥ . khyātaṁ yō
gavidāṁ varō vvyaraca tsaddha¨rmmaśāstraṁ
sudhīḥ . śākhāyā mmunivallabhassya baha
vaḥ prājñā budhā jagnirē . yōgīṁdrassya vasu
ṁddharāmaravara stattrānvayē yōjani . śrīmā
nbhānurakāśikānvayapayōvārāsirājōda
yaḥ . svāmī pallaha guddravāraviṣayē
ceṟusēṁḍru nāmni stutē grāmē rēmananā
madhēya dharaṇīdēvōttama ssadguṇī patnī tasya
satī śikhāmaṇi rabhū prōlāṁbbikā suvvratā .
tattputrō bhuvanattrayaikavidita śrīkāṭa
nā¨ryyaḥ kritī . dātā dha¨rmmapara ssuni¨rmmalama
ti ssaujanyalakṣmīpatiḥ . Annāṁbbā vikacāṁbbujā
tanayanā tasyābhava dkhyāyinī . pātivvratyagu
ṇānvitā jananutā sauṁdda¨ryya dhai¨ryyānvitā . tā
bhyāṁ puttravarā straya ssamabhava nviśvēśa nētrōpa
māḥ . ssū¨ryya ssū¨ryyāmaradruma ssudritimā
nnārāyaṇa ssadguṇaḥ . nāga styāgaguṇai¨rjjitā¨rkka
tanaya śrīyājñavalkyānvayaḥ sadbhaktaśśaśiśēkharā
ṁghriyugalē yabāṁttī vāṁtrītalē . jēṣṭhaśrēṣṭaguṇai
ścanaivavayasā sū¨ryya ssabha¨rttu ¨ryyudhi jitvāśa
truṁ dripālavīrasubhaṭa nrājēṁdracoḍaprabhōḥ .
vīra śrīramaṇiyya bhūriyaśasā nārāyaṇasyāgra
jaḥ śrīkaṁṭhābharaṇasya bhāti ca guṇai¨rnnāgasya bhōgau
kasaḥ . brahmōpēṁdra maheṁdravaṁditapadaṁ śaśva
nmahatvāspadaṁ . caṁdrā¨rddhōjvalaśēkharaṁ puraharaṁ
vikṣipta dakṣādhvaraṁjvālābhīlaviśālalōcanaśikhi
jvālālīdagdha smaraṁ . hṛtpadmastha maku¨rvvata prati
dinaṁ tyaktānyacittāścayē . saumyā bhavyaguṇā ssa
mā¨rjjita ghṛṇā ma¨rttyā striva¨rggāyadā . gaṁgāyā
viditā straya śśubhakarā mā¨rggāyadōyē trayīṁ .
puṇyāṁ bhūsuravaṁśava¨rddhanakarā nārīṁ dadhānā
yadhā bhānti kṣānti samanvitā śśivamatiṁ yē bhā
ṁtti śau¨ryyōnnatiṁ . dhāttryaṁ dha¨rmmajabhīmapā¨rtthasa
driśa ssatyē balē vikramē . saubhrātrēvilasadgu . ṇēva
ramatē viśvēśvarābhya¨rccanē . kāṁtyāṁsa¨rvvakalāka
lāpanipuṇē yē bhānti santō guṇai rannāmbbā
tanayā ssamā¨rjjitasayāḥ prakhyātasaukhyō
dayāḥ . saubhrātrātipavitrasadguṇadayāstō
traikapātraṁ raṇē jaitraṁ śatru ratragōtra tilakaṁ
dhātryāṁ suputratrayaṁ śrīvēdatrayava jja
gatraya miva śrīkāṭanākhyasya yat . bhātya
gnitrayava dguṇatritayava drāmatrayaṁ vā
bhuvi . śākābdē gatinaṁddakhēṁdugaṇitē yāmyā
yaṇē tē tvimē śrīmatpa¨rvvatapaścimākhyaviṣa
yē bhaktyā pradīpa mmudā grāmē śrīpuranā
madhēyaviditē rāmēśvarā yādarā dācaṁdrā
¨rkka makhaṁḍḍamaṁḍitadaśaṁ viśvēśvarā yādiśan .
śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1094 gu nēṁṭi dakṣiṇā
yanasaṁkrāṁtinimittamuna siripuramu
śrīmūlasthānamurāmēśvaramahādēvaraku sū
rapānu nārayanuṁḍunu nāgadēvaṁḍunu ta
mataṁḍri gāṭyaveggaḍakuṁ damatalli A
nyasāniki dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugā nakhaṁḍadīpamu
naku niccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni mrā
nyabōyunikoḍku Amarabōyuṁḍu tana
putrānupautrikaṁbugāni nittyamāne
ṁḍu neyi pōyaṁggavāru .
Digital edition of SII 10.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
